description: Heir for men by paris hilton comes in a delectable flask and has crisp bergamot, fir balsam, mandarin leaves, elemi, patchouli, brushed suede, lavender, iron musk, sandalwood, and amber notes.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
